message: Hey %player%, did you see the art display in the main hallway?
No, I haven't had a chance yet. What's it about?
It's a collection of student artwork from the past semester. There are some really impressive pieces.
I loved the painting of the sunset. It was so vibrant and full of life.
I should definitely check it out. Sounds amazing.
Do you enjoy looking at art?

options.text: Yes, I find it really inspiring.
Not really, but I appreciate the talent involved.
